title: phlegmariurus delbrueckii
intro: Phlegmariurus delbrueckii, also known as the Delbrueck's climbing fern or Delbrueck's phlegmariurus, is a species of climbing fern in the family Lycopodiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion, and has been traditionally used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions to address these issues. In some parts of the world, the plant is also used in traditional herbal preparations, including tonics and infusions, to promote overall well-being and respiratory health.
